publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-01-07 18:23:08 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Publications, speeches, correspondence, and research notes.
did.abstract: Publications, speeches, correspondence, and related research notes of Erling D. Solberg, a land economist.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Member, International Fraternity of Lambda Alpha, George Washington Chapter.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Publications, speeches, correspondence, and related research notes of Erling D. Solberg, a land economist.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Part of Lambda Alpha Literary Archives.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Erling D. Solberg papers, #3172. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Real property -- Economic aspects.
Land use -- Economic aspects.
controlaccess.corpname: Lambda Alpha International. George Washington Chapter
